nasb.text: I will let loose among you the beasts of the field, which will bereave you of your children and destroy your cattle and reduce your number so that your roads lie deserted.

esv.text: And I will let loose the wild beasts against you, which shall bereave you of your children and destroy your livestock and make you few in number, so that your roads shall be deserted.

cnv.text: 打發野地的走獸到你們中間，奪去你們的兒女，殘害你們的牲畜，減少你們的人口，使你們的道路荒涼。

ccb.text: 我要让野兽残害你们的子女，吞噬你们的牲畜，使你们人口锐减，路上杳无人迹。
